description: Discovery template for international federations and governing bodies seeking digital platforms, member systems, event technology, data programmes, and procurement support.
ideal_for: International federations, governing bodies, and sport administrators

signal_patterns.statement: Federation is planning a formal procurement or supplier selection programme
early_indicators: Procurement policy or tender notice on official site
Board or council approval for technology investment
Vendor registration or supplier portal references
Expressions of interest for digital services

signal_patterns.statement: Federation is modernising membership, CRM, or stakeholder management systems
early_indicators: Member services transformation programme
CRM replacement or federation database migration
New athlete, federation, or event management platform
Digital roadmap referencing stakeholder systems

signal_patterns.statement: Federation is seeking technology for event operations, accreditation, or competition delivery
early_indicators: Event hosting platform procurement
Accreditation or scheduling platform modernisation
Competition management system rollout
Broadcast, results, or timing platform integration

signal_patterns.statement: Federation is investing in data governance, analytics, or reporting infrastructure
early_indicators: Performance data programme announced
Data warehouse or analytics partner engagement
Reporting and governance framework updates
Digital strategy mentioning insights or intelligence

signal_patterns.statement: Federation is hiring digital or commercial leaders consistent with procurement activity
early_indicators: Head of Digital, Technology Director, or Commercial Systems role
Transformation programme manager role
Procurement or vendor management responsibilities in leadership jobs
Technology governance or systems leadership role
